Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension

Class AbstractNumberValidator<S,​T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>

java.lang.Object
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractObjectValidator<S,​T>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractComparableValidator<S,​T>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractNumberValidator<S,​T>
Type Parameters:
S - the type of validator returned by the methods
T - the type of the value being validated
All Implemented Interfaces:
ExtensibleComparableValidator<S,​T>, ExtensibleNumberValidator<S,​T>, ExtensibleObjectValidator<S,​T>
Direct Known Subclasses:
AbstractDoubleValidator, AbstractFloatValidator, AbstractIntegerValidator, BigDecimalPrecisionValidatorImpl, BigDecimalScaleValidatorImpl, BigDecimalValidatorImpl, NumberValidatorImpl, PrimitiveNumberValidatorImpl, SizeValidatorImpl
public abstract class AbstractNumberValidator<S,​T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
extends AbstractComparableValidator<S,​T>
implements ExtensibleNumberValidator<S,​T>
Default implementation of ExtensibleNumberValidator.

    isMultipleOf, isMultipleOf, isNegative, isNotMultipleOf, isNotMultipleOf, isNotNegative, isNotPositive, isNotWholeNumber, isNotZero, isPositive, isWholeNumber, isZero

    Methods declared in interface com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension.ExtensibleObjectValidator

    asString, asString, getActual, getFailures, isActualAvailable, isEqualTo, isEqualTo, isInstanceOf, isNotEqualTo, isNotEqualTo, isNotInstanceOf, isNotNull, isNotOneOf, isNotSameObjectAs, isNull, isOneOf, isSameObjectAs
